retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages and priority pages. Normalize before shipping to UI.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Spend PKR 1,000,000 within 12 months for annual fee reversal; reduced fee PKR 2,500 otherwise. Supplementary: spend PKR 50,000 within 60 days.

notes: World-specific page exposes the same shared Noor income grid as the other Noor cards: PKR 40,000 salaried approved, PKR 50,000 salaried unapproved, PKR 100,000 self-employed.
Recovered as an unsecured income-based card rather than a deposit-gated product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Spend PKR 30,000 within 60 days for annual fee reversal; reduced fee PKR 900 otherwise. Supplementary: spend PKR 15,000 within 60 days.

notes: Product page clearly surfaces PKR 40,000 salary threshold for salaried approved applicants.
Recovered as an unsecured income-based card rather than a deposit-gated product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Spend PKR 40,000 within 60 days for annual fee reversal; reduced fee PKR 1,100 otherwise. Supplementary: spend PKR 20,000 within 60 days.

notes: Titanium page exposes the shared Noor income grid: PKR 40,000 salaried approved, PKR 50,000 salaried unapproved, PKR 100,000 self-employed.
Recovered as an unsecured income-based card rather than a deposit-gated product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Complimentary Priority World Debit Card on maintenance of required priority thresholds.

notes: Priority eligibility can be met by PKR 3,000,000 quarterly average balance in CASA/current/saving, PKR 5,000,000 term deposit, or PKR 10,000,000 AUM with at least PKR 1,500,000 average quarterly CASA balance.
Priority experience page describes the card as complimentary while the required priority thresholds are maintained.
Supplementary cards allowed for loved ones above 18 years.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Complimentary Priority Platinum Debit Card on maintenance of required priority thresholds.

notes: Priority experience page describes the card as complimentary while the required priority thresholds are maintained.
Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists the primary annual membership fee for Mastercard Amal Gold at PKR 3,300.
No publicly disclosed salary or balance threshold.
Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists the primary annual membership fee for Mastercard Amal Platinum at PKR 7,000.
No publicly disclosed salary or balance threshold.

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Mastercard Classic Debit Card
notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists the primary annual membership fee for Mastercard Classic at PKR 2,300.
No publicly disclosed salary or balance threshold.

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Mastercard Gold Debit Card
notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOC lists the primary annual membership fee for Mastercard Gold at PKR 3,300.
No publicly disclosed salary or balance threshold.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 600 if PKR 20,000 spent within qualifying period

notes: Reduced fee model from Jul-Dec 2025 KFS. PKR 6,500 initial; reduced to PKR 600 post spend-target.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 600 if PKR 20,000 spent within qualifying period

notes: Entry-tier Noor card — likely the same tier as Velocity or a predecessor. Reduced fee model.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 2,100 if PKR 200,000 spent within qualifying period

notes: Reduced fee model from Jul-Dec 2025 KFS. Includes golf and Mastercard Championship Series access.

gaps: Most ordinary debit-card pages were weak on age, salary, and fee details.
Base annual-fee amounts for priority debit cards were not cleanly surfaced on the public pages reviewed.
Noor World, Platinum, Titanium, and Velocity pages did not cleanly expose card-specific minimum salary or balance thresholds in the pages reviewed.
